channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Seven Arrested in Atlantis After Murder and Hijacking of Two Women
item.description: Seven suspects, aged between 20 and 40, have been arrested in connection with the hijacking and murder of two women in Atlantis. The victims, both foreign nationals from Ghana living in South Africa, ...

item.title: Australian sprinter Eddie Nketia posts impressive 100m time in the US
item.description: Australian sprinter Eddie Nketia has once again drawn attention with his latest 100-metre sprint performance in the United States. Known for his explosive speed and technique, Nketia continues to make...

item.title: Cornet Mamabolo Reflects on Portraying Peter Mokaba and His First Executive Producer Role

item.title: Cecil Beaton’s 1951 Vogue Portraits Capture Jackie and Lee Bouvier’s High-Society Debut
item.description: In 1951, renowned photographer Cecil Beaton created a memorable series of portraits featuring the Bouvier sisters—Jacqueline Bouvier, later known as Jackie Kennedy Onassis, and her younger sister Lee,...

item.title: Four suspects remanded in Kano over alleged killing linked to dispute
item.description: A magistrate court for Gyadi-Gyadi area of Kano Municipal don order say four suspects must remain for correctional facility over allegation of criminal conspiracy and killing of one man, Yusuf Aliyasu...

item.title: Mike Sonko and Raila Odinga Recognised at Heroes of Africa Awards for Philanthropy and Leadership
item.description: During a ceremony held at KICC, former Nairobi governor Mike Sonko and the late former prime minister Raila Odinga were recognised at the Heroes of Africa Awards for their contributions to society. So...

item.title: Balochistan operation results in 35 militants killed, three commanders captured
item.description: In a major intelligence-based operation in Balochistan, at least 35 militants of local terrorist groups were killed and three key commanders were taken into custody, the provincial government confirme...

item.title: Rotterdam authorities prepare quarantine for cruise ship with hantavirus cases
item.description: Health authorities in the Netherlands are taking proactive measures as a cruise ship carrying confirmed cases of hantavirus is scheduled to dock in Rotterdam. The authorities have prepared quarantine ...

item.title: Canberra Mourns Alan Jessop, the Long-Time Salvos Volunteer
item.description: Alan Jessop, affectionately known as the 'Salvo Man' of Canberra, has died peacefully at 95, leaving behind a legacy of kindness and dedication. Over 32 years, he personally collected around $4 millio...

item.title: Mike Johnson Comments on Gerrymandering and Voting Rights After Supreme Court Decision
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson (R-LA) addressed questions about Black voters following the Supreme Court's recent decision that limited key protections of the Voting Rights Act. During an interview with F...

item.title: Peel police rescue 57 kittens and eight adult cats; Mississauga man faces 134 animal cruelty charges
item.description: Peel Regional Police, in collaboration with Animal Welfare Services (AWS), carried out a significant animal cruelty investigation resulting in the rescue of 57 kittens and eight adult cats. The invest...

item.title: SCOPA launches probe into eThekwini Municipality over project and financial management issues
item.description: The Standing Committee on Public Accounts (SCOPA) has initiated a thorough investigation into the eThekwini Metropolitan Municipality, examining alleged failures in project management, financial overs...

item.title: The Role of Independent Bookstores in Nurturing India's Reading Culture
item.description: Independent bookstores in India are playing a crucial role in nurturing a reading culture across the country. Unlike large retail chains, these bookstores are meticulously curated, offering a selectio...

item.title: Obi and Kwankwaso Join NDC After PRP Talks Fail Over Ticket Guarantees
item.description: The Peoples Redemption Party (PRP) don talk say the reason wey Peter Obi and Rabiu Kwankwaso no fit join their party na because dem no get guarantee say dem go fit secure the presidential and vice-pre...

item.title: Highlights of Fielding Brilliance and Dropped Opportunities in IPL 2026
item.description: The 2026 Indian Premier League season has seen some extraordinary catches but also an alarming number of dropped chances. Iconic moments like Suryakumar Yadav’s breathtaking catch during India’s T20 W...

item.title: Trump criticizes former aide involved in efforts to secure Pentagon funding amid Iran war

item.title: Toronto Rock take Game 1 victory over Halifax Thunderbirds in NLL Finals
item.description: The Halifax Thunderbirds fell short in the first game of the National Lacrosse League (NLL) Finals, losing to the Toronto Rock. The match, which took place in Halifax, saw the Rock assert strong offen...

item.title: Forza Horizon 6 Italian Passions Car Pack: contents and release details
item.description: Forza Horizon 6 players with the Premium Edition or those who purchase the add-on separately will soon receive the Italian Passions Car Pack. This pack features four Italian vehicles: the 2025 Ferrari...

item.title: Government approves blue passports for high-paying taxpayers and plans modernisation of passport services
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Authorities in Pakistan have approved blue passports for 42 top taxpayers who have been designated as ambassadors at large, following directives from the Prime Minister. Most of these passp...

item.title: Rescue operation saves four hikers stranded in snowy conditions on North Shore Mountain
item.description: On May 17, 2026, four hikers found themselves stranded on a North Shore mountain due to unexpected snowy conditions. Local emergency services were quickly alerted after the hikers encountered difficul...
